prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild infirmary scene; Toma Oakspire, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket, and Toma Starling, a masculine healer in cream and mint robes, work together to capture a glowing, mischievous potion sprite hovering near a shelf. Toma Oakspire reaches up with quick, balanced movements while Toma Starling holds a wooden basin, both focused on the task. Soft lamplight, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild infirmary shot; Toma Oakspire successfully catches the glowing sprite and passes it to Toma Starling, who carefully guides it into the wooden basin to contain the sticky mess. The two share a relieved, cooperative look as the room settles. Consistent character appearances, soft lighting, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.
